name: MetricMappingEditor
description: Dialog for a connection's broker-status metric-tile mappings: add/edit/delete rows with Label, Topic (required), JSON path, Unit, and an Overrides target (a builtin tile id or a custom tile). Persists via the SysMetricMapping CRUD bindings and reloads the store. Opens blank or prefilled from the raw browser's pin action.

props.name: connectionId
props.description: Connection whose mappings are listed and edited.

props.name: store
props.description: BrokerStatusStore; reloadMappings() is called after every create/update/delete so tiles refresh live.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: Writable<boolean> controlling visibility; the form reloads and resets each time it opens.

props.name: prefill
props.description: { topic?, label? } seeding the add-mode draft (used by the raw browser's pin-as-tile).

notes: Figma is not linked yet. Delete has no confirm step (rows are cheap to recreate) but uses the destructive text-error styling. Override targets exclude the computed observed_* tiles, which have no topic to redirect.
